// The Brand

BORN FROM THE DARK

Toxic Lord isn't just a clothing brand — it's a declaration. Built for those who inhale chaos and exhale control. For the ones who wear their darkness like armor and move through the world with the quiet power of someone who has nothing left to prove.

Every piece is crafted with intention — heavy-weight fabrics, premium embroidery, limited drops. No restocks. No compromises.
